calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Joe Vickstein. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Continued To Mar-12-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance plaintiff. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250. The order to show cause is reset for 3/19/03 @ 1:30PM. Proceedings reported by Patricia Van Steenberge. (212)
